name: multi-tool-semi-structured
description: Tool-use system prompt with headers and newlines but missing bullets, format instruction, and output constraint. Tests partial structural compliance on large Anthropic context.

input.prompt:
### System Context
You have access to the following tools: web_search, code_execution, file_read.

Use these tools to research the topic thoroughly and answer the question.

notes: Structural: has \n(✓) and ### header(✓), missing bullets(+20)+format(+25)+constraint(+20)=65→bucket=65. Length 45000/200000=0.225→bucket=15. Context (49096/200000)=0.245→bucket=5. Ambiguity=0. Volatility=0. Score=19.
